options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: minimum_resource_pack_amount
options.description: The minimum amount of resources available in a resource pack

options.name: maximum_resource_pack_amount
options.description: The maximum amount of resources available in a resource pack

options.name: duplicate_items
options.description:
Adds duplicates of items to the item pool (if configured in Filler items). These will be selected alongside
Resource Packs (if configured). Note that there are not many progression items, and selecting Progression may
produce many of the same duplicate item.

options.name: filler_item_types
options.description: Determines whether to use Resource Packs, Duplicate Items (as configured), or both.

options.name: island_frequency_locations
options.description:
Sets where frequencies for story islands are located.
Vanilla will keep frequencies in their vanilla, non-randomized locations.
Random On Island will randomize each frequency within its vanilla island, but will preserve island order.
Random Island Order will change the order you visit islands, but will preserve the vanilla location of each frequency unlock.
Random On Island Random Order will randomize the location containing the frequency on each island and randomize the order.
Progressive will randomize the frequencies to anywhere, but will always unlock the frequencies in vanilla order as the frequency items are received.
Anywhere will randomize the frequencies to anywhere, and frequencies will be received in any order.

options.name: island_generation_distance
options.description: Sets how far away islands spawn from you when you input their coordinates into the Receiver.

options.name: expensive_research
options.description:
If No is selected, researching items and unlocking items in the Crafting Table works the same as vanilla Raft.
If Yes is selected, each unlock in the Crafting Table will require its own set of researched items in order to unlock it.

options.name: progressive_items
options.description: Makes some items, like the Bow and Arrow, progressive rather than raw unlocks.

options.name: big_island_early_crafting
options.description:
Allows recipes that require items from big islands (eg leather) to lock earlygame items like the Receiver, Bolt,
or Smelter. Big islands are available from the start of the game, however it can take a long time to find them.

options.name: paddleboard_mode
options.description: Sets later story islands to be in logic without an Engine or Steering Wheel. May require lots of paddling.

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
